## Tests added

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`make test`)
- [ ] Linter passes (`make lint`)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] No new `TODO` comments without a milestone reference (e.g., `// TODO(M2): ...`)
- [ ] No raw SQL strings, no `any` escape hatches, no empty error handlers
- [ ] Repo layout matches `prd/00-MASTER-ARCHITECTURE.md §2`
